Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}I'm feeling sluggish from staying up so late, so I came to the nurse's office to take a nap...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}But that nurse gave me some weird medicine instead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}It looked gross, so I turned it down... Only a brave soul would dare drink something like that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}I'm at the nurse's office because I don't feel well, you know? But he started giving me lessons...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}When I listened to his lecture till the end, he gave me a medicine I've never heard of as a "reward"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}I mean... Just let me sleep, you know what I mean?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}I wonder if Mr. Edogawa will ever give out any normal medicine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}Actually, I wish he'd just let us use the bed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}By the way, don't you think Mr. Edogawa and Ms. Ounishi make a weird pair?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}They always fight with each other... But for those two, it works.[n]{f 1 1}
